meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Level Up Your Coding for AI Builders
content.seo_description: Break through your development plateau. Learn how to configure Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-grade applications as an intermediate developer.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'basic app' barrier, you must move beyond manual coding. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you gain an autonomous engineering agent that handles boilerplate, debugs complex logic, and enforces architectural patterns, allowing you to focus on high-level system design and solving real-world user problems effectively.
content.intro:
You have built the to-do lists and the weather trackers. But every time you reach for a complex feature—a custom authentication flow or a real-time data sync—you hit a wall, staring at a blank terminal, unsure of the next architectural leap. The gap between a hobbyist project and a professional SaaS is not just effort; it is about the sophistication of your development environment.

Today, we bridge that gap. We are transforming your workflow from manual, line-by-line typing into a high-leverage engineering process. By mastering Claude Code and the Antigravity integration, you are not just writing code; you are orchestrating an AI-driven development lifecycle that scales as fast as your ambition.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, isolated workspace for your AI agent to ensure it has the necessary permissions to read project files without compromising your local machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a secure project workspace structure optimized for Claude Code, including a .clauderules file to enforce clean architecture and modular design patterns.

steps.title: Context Injection
steps.description: Feed your project's architectural intent to the agent so it understands the 'why' behind your code, not just the 'what'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory and generate a technical specification document that outlines the core features, data models, and API requirements for this project.

steps.title: Autonomous Scaffold Generation
steps.description: Use the agent to generate boilerplate code that adheres to industry standards, saving you hours of repetitive setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Using the architecture specs, scaffold a secure authentication module using Next.js and Supabase, adhering to modular component design principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate auth module based on project specs'

steps.title: Iterative Debugging Loop
steps.description: Stop debugging manually. Use Claude Code to identify edge cases and test failures in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a diagnostic scan on the current codebase, identify potential race conditions in the data layer, and propose refactored solutions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'debug data layer race conditions'

steps.title: Production-Ready Review
steps.description: Finalize your build by having the AI perform a peer review of your code, focusing on performance, security, and scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior engineer-level code review of the entire project, flagging security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'perform senior engineer security audit'

pro_tips: Always maintain a .clauderules file to force the agent to use specific libraries you prefer, preventing it from suggesting legacy or bloated dependencies.
Use Claude Code's 'chat' mode to explain the business logic of your app before asking it to write code; the context improves output accuracy by 40%.
Never blindly accept refactors; ask the agent to 'explain the trade-offs' of its proposed solution to deepen your own architectural understanding.
Map your local environment variables to the Claude process carefully; never expose secrets in the context window by using placeholders.
Treat your agent as a junior developer: review its output, correct its mistakes, and it will learn your specific coding style over time.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is automated, deploy your first milestone to a staging environment and document the performance metrics to share in your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an AI-augmented engineer capable of shipping production-grade software. The bottleneck is gone. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
